reasoning: Lactate clearance and fatigue resistance are crucial for your target segment on the Alpine Loop. Your last ride showed good recovery, so you're ready to tackle this limiter more aggressively. By focusing on over-unders, you'll strengthen your ability to manage fluctuations in power during prolonged climbs like the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 2x10min Over-Unders at 5min: 242-256W followed by 5min: 201-218W. Rest 10 min between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
